option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltPayment100k:"More like 100k, due to hazard. I made it, unlike your freelancer."
original: More like 100k, due to hazard. I made it, unlike your freelancer.
translated: Plutôt 100 000, vu le risque. J'ai survécu, contrairement à votre freelance.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltNoPayment:"I will forgo payment. Advancement of knowledge is wealth enough."
original: I will forgo payment. Advancement of knowledge is wealth enough.
translated: Je renonce au paiement. L'avancement du savoir est une richesse suffisante.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltNoPaymentLie:"I will forgo payment. Advancement of knowledge is wealth enough." (lie)
original: I will forgo payment. Advancement of knowledge is wealth enough." (lie)
translated: Je renonce au paiement. L'avancement du savoir est une richesse suffisante." (mensonge)

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltWrapup1:"My people say it's pointing at a rock in the Abyss. Something happened there."
original: My people say it's pointing at a rock in the Abyss. Something happened there.
translated: Mes gens disent que ça pointe vers un rocher dans l'Abysse. Quelque chose s'y est passé.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltWrapup2:"If you don't know what, then why? Why this array data? Why these coordinates?"
original: If you don't know what, then why? Why this array data? Why these coordinates?
translated: Si vous ne savez pas quoi, alors pourquoi ? Pourquoi ces données de capteurs ? Pourquoi ces coordonnées ?

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltWrapup3:"Who is your patron? If they're so wealthy, I'm sure I've heard of them."
original: Who is your patron? If they're so wealthy, I'm sure I've heard of them.
translated: Qui est votre mécène ? S'il est si riche, je suis sûr d'en avoir entendu parler.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltWrapup3z:"Are you sure your patron is only interested in pure discovery?"
original: Are you sure your patron is only interested in pure discovery?
translated: Êtes-vous sûr que votre mécène ne s'intéresse qu'à la découverte pure ?

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltWrapup4a:"Are you sure you can't tell me?"
original: Are you sure you can't tell me?
translated: Êtes-vous sûr de ne pas pouvoir me le dire ?
